PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player ?playerLabel ?team ?teamLabel ?city ?cityLabel WHERE {
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q1213601 ; rdfs:label ?awardLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?awardLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(regex(LCASE(?awardLabel) , "metro atlantic athletic conference men's basketball player of the year" , "i"))
  ?player wdt:P1342 ?award ; wdt:P569 "1962-11-05" ^^ xsd:date ; rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  ?player wdt:P161 ?team ; rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = "en")
  ?team wdt:P131 ?city ; rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?cityLabel) = "en")
}
